posts.author: Anthony11989 (Antonio Armendariz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good day,
I’ve seen a lot about (copy) remove duplicator support tickets out there with the only source is to subscribe to a subscription… I did not want to subscribe to a subscription, so I created a webhook to resolve my issues. Keep in mind that this webhook is only useful for removing (copy) suffix after an item has been duplicated.

Here is my youtube video with a GitHub link below. The way I set my webhook is 100% free… However, depending on your business size and needs you might have too either up your server data from Render… or if you have an IT guy… have him host the source code on your company server.

Without further ado… Here y’all go.
